---
title: "Day 4 · Exercise (graded)"
subtitle: "One-variable visualisation"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format: html
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```

# 1. Histogram + density

Produce a combined histogram and density plot for a continuous tourism
variable from an ISTAC series. Label axes and units, include a source
line.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 2. Boxplot

Produce a boxplot of the same variable, highlighting the outliers.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 3. Categorical bar chart

Choose a categorical tourism variable (origin country, purpose of
visit, island of stay...) and produce a bar chart ordered by
frequency, with a meaningful title.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 4. Brief commentary

In 5–8 sentences, describe what each plot reveals about the
distribution and whether the three views are consistent.
